summary: Tested PR celebration modal defensive fix on today.tsx. All 4 test cases passed. Valid PR modal fires with correct values, no 0×0 display in visible modal, DISMISS works, no console warnings.
critical_code_review_comments: Hidden PR share card (Part 3C, line 2874) renders '{prCelebration?.weight || 0} lbs × {prCelebration?.reps || 0} reps' — when prCelebration is null this shows '0 lbs × 0 reps' in the DOM but is hidden via height:0/overflow:hidden. This is not a user-facing issue since the card is only captured via captureRef for sharing. No action needed.
context_for_next_testing_agent: PR celebration modal fix verified working. Defensive useEffect (line 1723) and render guard (line 2758) both in place. Tested with user_a@theprogram.app on Speed Squat exercise with 500 lbs × 5 reps.

test_results.TEST1_valid_pr_modal: PASS — Modal fired with Speed Squat 500 lbs × 5 reps, Est. Max 583 lbs, confetti particles visible
test_results.TEST2_no_zero_display: PASS — No '0lbs × 0 reps' in visible modal. Hidden share card (off-screen) shows 0 when prCelebration=null which is expected/acceptable
test_results.TEST3_dismiss_works: PASS — DISMISS button closes modal correctly
test_results.TEST4_console_warnings: PASS — No '[Today] Invalid PR celebration detected' warnings in console
